What We Do

服務項目Our Services

住宅空間設計Residential Design

Residential Design

以居住者的生活方式為核心，打造兼具美感與機能的理想居家空間。 Crafting ideal living spaces that balance aesthetics and functionality, centered around each resident's lifestyle.

Learn More →

商業空間設計Commercial Design

Commercial Design

為品牌創造獨特的空間體驗，涵蓋餐飲、零售、辦公與文化場域。 Creating unique spatial experiences for brands across dining, retail, office, and cultural venues.

Learn More →

建築外觀設計Architectural Design

Architectural Design

從建築立面到室內空間的整合設計，業界少見的雙軌設計服務。 Integrated design from facade to interior — a rare dual-track service in the industry.

Learn More →

全屋訂製Full Home Customization

Full Home Customization

系統櫃體與訂製家具的一站式整合服務，設計師品質的全屋訂製。 One-stop custom cabinetry and bespoke furniture, delivering designer-quality whole-home solutions.

Learn More →

Design Philosophy

以減法設計
回歸空間本質 Design by Subtraction,
Return to Essence

川果設計相信，好的空間不在於填滿，而在於留白。
我們以侘寂美學為核心，尊重材質的本真語言，
透過光影的詩意與空間的敘事，為每一個場域說一個獨特的故事。 At NID Design Lab, we believe great spaces are defined not by what fills them, but by what is left open.
Rooted in Wabi-sabi aesthetics, we honor the authentic language of materials,
weaving poetry of light and spatial narratives to tell each venue's unique story.

認識川果About Us →

Our Approach

設計理念Design Principles

侘寂美學Wabi-sabi Aesthetics

擁抱不完美之美，在時間的痕跡中找到寧靜與深度，讓空間散發自然而然的質感。Embracing the beauty of imperfection, finding tranquility and depth in the traces of time, letting spaces radiate an effortless texture.

光影運用Light & Shadow

策略性引入自然光，讓光影成為空間的第二建材，隨時間推移創造流動的空間層次。Strategically introducing natural light, making light and shadow the second building material that creates fluid spatial layers as time passes.

材質本真Material Authenticity

尊重每一種材料的原始語言，展現木、石、金屬、混凝土的本質美感，而非裝飾性覆蓋。Respecting the original language of every material — revealing the inherent beauty of wood, stone, metal, and concrete rather than decorative concealment.

歷史保存Adaptive Reuse

以 Adaptive Reuse 的理念，為歷史空間注入當代生命力，在保存與創新之間找到平衡。Breathing contemporary life into heritage spaces through Adaptive Reuse, finding the balance between preservation and innovation.

減法設計Subtractive Design

去除一切不必要的元素，讓空間回歸本質。少，即是多。留白，即是豐盈。Removing all unnecessary elements to return space to its essence. Less is more. Emptiness is abundance.

空間敘事Spatial Narrative

每一個空間都有它的故事。我們透過設計語彙，為場域譜寫屬於它的獨特篇章。Every space has its own story. Through our design vocabulary, we compose a unique chapter for each venue.
